human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for agricultural supply-chain coordination specificity across traceability, seasonal, environment, and boundary escalation behavior; confirmed functionality coverage and scenario completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicitly limited to coordination, dependency intake, blockers, and routing for agricultural, forestry, fishery, and hunting continuity while excluding agronomic/veterinary/environmental/execution authority.
Authority sources include federal food-traceability, production, fisheries, land, and environmental references and directly map to seasonal, traceability, and escalation decisions.
Scenario suite validates normal in-scope execution, missing prerequisites, duplicate ownership, traceability conflicts, seasonal dependencies, and boundary escalation cases.
Ready-to-run release and deployment artifacts are present in standard validated package locations for the industry overlay domain.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were introduced in this pack based on local scenario-coverage review.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and readiness/evidence.json as required.
Functionality map and results are aligned with the 12 scenario set.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated agricultural supply-chain overlay coordinator pack for evidence-backed handoff handling and refusal-safe routing.
Runtime remains `specification-based` until a retained implementation is intentionally promoted through operational governance.
